Triggering the system-level high-altitude commercial office deconstruction and the '2-employee automotive electronic design studio/event sublessor' physical demotion probe. The extremely absurd Apple multinational consumer electronics OEM template in the original data has been physically written off. This enterprise, named 'Wu Ai Si Automotive Technology,' was extremely rigidly categorized into 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' by the official big data system. However, the forensic logic engine directly intercepted its fatal flaw: the insured headcount is a pitiful 2 people! The paid-in capital is 2.466 million. The most fatal blow similarly comes from its incredibly gorgeous high-altitude coordinates: 'Room 1103, Building 3, Runjing Science and Technology Plaza.' The logical deduction instantly turned into dark humor: inside a small office on the 11th floor of a science and technology plaza, a boss with 1 assistant, holding over two million RMB, claims to have built a manufacturing line for automotive electronic and electrical products? Even more comical is that the latter half of the business license suddenly crosses boundaries into 'event and exhibition planning; property management.' The probe mercilessly deleted the 'manufacturing' illusion bestowed by the system (in fact, the license itself is very honest, only stating R&D and design, not manufacturing). The truth is extremely clear: this is a 100% pure 2-Employee Automotive Electronic Design Studio & Event Shell operating as a high-rise office building entity. The boss is highly likely an engineer or broker with some knowledge of automotive electronics, drawing blueprints on a computer on the 11th floor, doing some industrial design outsourcing, and occasionally taking jobs installing weak-current equipment for enterprises; when business is slow, utilizing available funds and connections to undertake exhibitions, or perhaps even renting out floors to act as a 'sublessor' (property management). The official 'Electronic Device Manufacturing Entity' tag is the most absurd misinterpretation of this asset-light design and service business.
